{{Quote|Whaddaya know, the l'il sandbag's got a gun.|Big Gizz|<ref name="Sand Blasted">{{Tales|4|Sand Blasted}}</ref>}}
'''Klepti B'ay''' was a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] whose clan picked up the wreckage of a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] spaceship as salvage. Unbeknownst to them, a [[Dark Trooper/Legends|dark trooper]] aboard was in working condition. After freeing itself of the wreckage, it killed most of the Jawas aboard the [[Sandcrawler/Legends|sandcrawler]]. The uncontrolled sandcrawler crashed into the [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] [[Mos Espa Grand Arena/Legends|Grand Arena]], leaving Klepti B'ay the only Jawa to survive, and nearly killing nearby mercenaries [[Gizman]], [[Spiker]], and [[Onoh]].

After encountering Big Gizz and Spiker, he proved a valuable "ally", as Gizz stole his blaster, almost knocking out the Jawa in the process, and used it against the dark trooper. Klepti also helped Onoh push a large mound of rubble onto the dark trooper. After this, he swore a [[Life debt/Legends|life debt]] to Gizz and Spiker, and was "adopted" into the group.
